Class LoadSessionIcon

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.swing.icons.AbstractAnahataIcon
uno.anahata.asi.swing.icons.LoadSessionIcon
All Implemented Interfaces:
Icon
public class LoadSessionIcon extends AbstractAnahataIcon
A programmatically drawn Icon representing the "Load Session" action.

It is stylized as a folder with an arrow pointing out, using the full Barça palette (Yellow body, Blue border, Red arrow).

Author:
anahata
